name: CatalogAgent: A Supervisor-mediated Self-Learning System Enabling Context Engineering for GenAI Models

description: arXiv:2607.14396v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Product catalogs are the backbone of e-commerce sites, yet a large number of structured attributes (SAs) -- such as material, color, and shape -- often have missing values. Typically, SA values are extracted from product information, including titles and descriptions. While LLM-based generator-evaluator frameworks have demonstrated effectiveness f...
author: Zhu Cheng (Xuan), Zhenming Wang (Xuan),  Yu (Xuan),  Tang, Dan Liu, Bryan Zhang, Athanasios N. Nikolakopoulos, Pranav Souri Itabada, Jing Zhang, Chih-Chi Chou, Peng Gao, Fatemeh Mansoori, Bharat Bojja, Sarath Chander, Sameer Thombare, Umit Batur, Tarik Arici
